data.content: Implemented CLI approval visibility for live terminal and history console. Added shared approval-request formatting for Codex mcpServer/elicitation/request, Gemini session/request_permission, and AskUserQuestion/Copilot user_input.requested; documented OpenCode as unsupported in current adapter fixtures. Branch: c30f-show-cli-approval-requests. Commit: dbe58d1d27376ddc46aa9356b5d62636a069b442. Verified: targeted approval/history tests, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
